exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your restaurant opening forward
items: What specific culinary vision and dining experience do you want to create, and how does this align with your personal values, skills, and the authentic story you want to tell through your restaurant?

What are the core operational competencies and industry knowledge gaps you need to address before opening, and how will you systematically build expertise in areas like food cost management, labor scheduling, vendor relationships, and health department compliance?

What are your non-negotiable financial boundaries and realistic expectations for profitability, and how will you structure your investment, operating capital, and personal financial safety net to weather the challenging first 18 months of operation?

What specific market research and competitive analysis do you need to conduct to validate your restaurant concept, understand your target demographic, and position yourself effectively within your local dining landscape?

How will you systematically evaluate and prioritize location options based on critical factors like foot traffic patterns, demographic alignment, lease terms, infrastructure requirements, and long-term neighborhood development plans?

What are the fundamental restaurant industry dynamics, economic realities, and operational demands that you need to fully understand and accept before committing to this venture, including the physical and emotional toll of restaurant ownership?
